channel.title: Local AI Intel Brief
channel.description: Intelligence brief on local AI, on-device models, and edge computing developments.
channel.itunes:author: Knowledge Studio
channel.itunes:summary: Intelligence brief on local AI, on-device models, and edge computing developments.

item.title: Local AI Intel Daily Brief — April 22, 2026
item.description: Hey, welcome back. We're taking a look at the AI services marketplace today—specifically what's happening with agencies right now as the platforms they depend on are shipping features that used to be their entire service offering. It's a critical moment, and there's a clear pattern emerging about ho...

item.title: Local AI Intel Daily Brief — April 20, 2026
item.description:
Welcome back. We've got a really interesting story unfolding in the AI services space right now, and it's fundamentally reshaping how agencies should be thinking about their positioning and their pricing. So let's walk through what's happening.

item.title: Local AI Intel Daily Brief — March 25, 2026
item.description:
Hey everyone, welcome back. Today we're looking at something that's genuinely shifted in the agency AI space over the last week or two, and it's worth paying close attention to because it changes how you should be thinking about positioning your services.

item.title: Local AI Intel Daily Brief — March 23, 2026
item.description:
Hey, welcome back. Let's talk about what's actually happening in the AI services space right now, because it's shifted in a really important way and I think a lot of agencies haven't noticed yet.
The big inflection point we're seeing is that the market has moved past "how do we build an agent" into...

item.title: Local AI Intel Daily Brief — March 18, 2026
item.description: Welcome back. We're looking at the AI services marketplace today, and there's something pretty significant happening right now: the entire value proposition of what agencies sell has fundamentally shifted. We're not talking about building agents anymore. We're talking about running them reliably, pr...
